FAQ.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subheading: Everything you need to know before we start working together

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: Our standard Package X Plus takes about 5-7 business days Custom enterprise solutions may take 2-4 weeks We pride ourselves on rapid deployment without sacrificing premium quality

items.q: Will I be able to update the website myself?
items.a: Yes! If your package includes a CMS (like Sanity or WordPress headless), we will provide you with a simple dashboard and tutorial so you can swap text, add blogs, and update images easily

items.q: What do I need to prepare before we start?
items.a: All we need is your branding (logo, colors), existing social media links, and a brief idea of the services you offer We will handle the copywriting, structure, and design for you

Every website we build is fundamentally SEO optimized out of the box (fast loading, semantic HTML, mobile-friendly) For ongoing content strategies and backlinking, we offer dedicated monthly SEO retainer plans
We offer a 100% money-back guarantee If you do not see an improvement in lead generation and conversion metrics after launching our optimized platform within 30 days, we refund your money Period
